commands.review_summary:
Adds closest-line diagnostics to edit-tool oldText mismatch errors and adds focused unit and integration coverage.

PR surface: Source +170, Tests +72. Total +242 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced defects: source inspection shows multi-edit not-found errors use a different message than the PR checks, and the new closest-line helper walks every nonblank line before returning three candidates. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus author or maintainer handling of the code findings; ClawSweeper should not open a repair lane while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: feat(edit): show closest candidate lines on oldText mismatch (#97032)
target.body:
Closes #97032.

## Problem
When the edit tool's `oldText` doesn't match, it only says "Could not find the exact text" (plus a dump of the file). There's no signal about *why* — wrong indentation, an escaped vs literal character, or a small typo all produce the same opaque error, so callers blind-guess.

## Change
On the existing not-found error path, append a **"Closest line(s)"** block: up to 3 file lines most similar to the first non-blank line of `oldText`, each with its line number and a note on the likely difference:

- `indentation differs: expected 4 spaces, found 8 spaces`
- `indentation differs: expected 4 spaces, found 2 tabs`
- `content differs` (near-miss — e.g. `\b` vs `\\b`)

Candidate strings are JSON-escaped so whitespace and backslashes are visible.

## Scope / safety
- **Matching algorithm is unchanged.** New code is pure (`findClosestLines` / `describeClosestLines` in `edit-diff.ts`) and only runs when an edit has already failed to match — zero side effects on successful edits.
- Distance is a length-capped Levenshtein over trimmed lines; clearly-unrelated lines (>60% different) are dropped, so the block stays empty when nothing is close.
- The existing "Current file contents" hint is preserved.

## Tests
- New `edit-diff.closest-lines.test.ts` unit tests (indentation, tabs-vs-spaces, escaped-vs-literal, candidate cap, empty-on-no-match).
- New integration test in `edit.test.ts` for the indentation case.
- Full `edit` + `edit-diff` suites green (52 passing) via `vitest run`.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: ianalloway
